---
title: ""
---

<img src="profile.jpg" alt="Germán A. Tessmer" style="float: right; margin: 0 0 1.5rem 2rem; width: 200px; border-radius: 6px;"/>

## Germán A. Tessmer

I am an economist at [Universidad Nacional de Rosario (UNR)](https://www.unr.edu.ar), where I direct the [Observatorio Económico Social](https://observatorio.unr.edu.ar) and teach Econometrics. My work is grounded in labor economics — informality, wage premia, and employment dynamics in Argentina — and carried out with the methods that now define rigorous applied research: causal inference, machine learning for variable selection, and AI-assisted empirical workflows.

[C.V.](cv.qmd)  ·  [Research](research.qmd)

email: [ger.tessmer\@gmail.com](mailto:ger.tessmer@gmail.com)  ·  [german.tessmer\@unr.edu.ar](mailto:german.tessmer@unr.edu.ar)
